node.statement: LEFT REDUCTION. Fix a,b in A=Im P (def near-fixed-algebra). Set p:=P(a^2)=a^2-h_{a,a} in A, where h_{a,a}=a^2-P(a^2) in Ker P (def square-hole; P(h_{a,a})=0 by P^2=P, GT-Pprops). Crude bound ||p||=||P(a^2)||<=||P|| ||a^2||<=(1+C eta)||a||^2<=C||a||^2 (GT-Pprops, GT-jb-submult ||a^2||<=||a||^2). CLAIM: ((a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb)‚ÄĘa = P((a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa) + E_L with ||E_L|| <= C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Hence ((a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb)‚ÄĘa = P((a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa) + O(sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||). PROOF: a‚ÄĘa=P(a‚ąėa)=P(a^2)=p, so (a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb=P(p‚ąėb). Then ((a‚ÄĘa)‚ÄĘb)‚ÄĘa=P(P(p‚ąėb)‚ąėa). Write l:=h_{p,b}=p‚ąėb-P(p‚ąėb) in Ker P (def square-hole). By P real-linear (GT-Pprops), P(P(p‚ąėb)‚ąėa)=P((p‚ąėb)‚ąėa)-P(l‚ąėa). Using p=a^2-h_{a,a} and bilinearity of ‚ąė (def jordan-product), (p‚ąėb)‚ąėa=(a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa-(h_{a,a}‚ąėb)‚ąėa, so P((p‚ąėb)‚ąėa)=P((a^2‚ąėb)‚ąėa)-P((h_{a,a}‚ąėb)‚ąėa). Thus E_L=-P(l‚ąėa)-P((h_{a,a}‚ąėb)‚ąėa). Node 1.1.1 bounds ||P(l‚ąėa)||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||; node 1.1.2 bounds ||P((h_{a,a}‚ąėb)‚ąėa)||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Sum: ||E_L||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Uses node 1.1.1, node 1.1.2, GT-Pprops, GT-jb-submult, def near-fixed-algebra, def square-hole, def jordan-product.
